fullArticle:
The widely expected unrest never arrived. France beat Morocco 2–0, yet Paris remained broadly peaceful despite fears that either victory celebrations or defeat would trigger disorder.

Those fears had precedent. After PSG’s Champions League win in May, cars and shops were attacked, fires were set and 780 people were arrested across France....
